title: Default Beta
body:
# Introduction
Welcome to Default Beta!

- It changes almost all of the stuff to Beta 1.7.3. Beta 1.8 and up uses their first versions of the stuff!

# Features
- Old Oak Boats 🛶 -Changes the models and texture to the old ones!
- Old Zombie Villagers 🧟‍♂️ -Changes the textures for zombie villagers to their pre-1.14 versions!
- Old Sounds 🔊 -Changes most of the sounds to their old versions like door and arrow sounds!
- Old Red Beds 🛏 -Changes the Red Bed Texture and adds the 2d version of it!
- Old Head and Skull items 💀 -Adds the 2d item form of them!
- Old Normal Chests 🧰 -Changes it to the full block versions!
- Old Bow Holdings 🏹 -Changes it so you hold it like an item (not the tools)!
- 3d Acacia and Jungle Doors 🚪 -Changes it to the Snapshot 14w32d versions of them, being 3D! (Credits to [ArkyFursblack](https://modrinth.com/user/ArkyFursblack) for it)
- Technoblade Pigs 🐷👑 -Adds a crown to the pig using a name tag named "Technoblade"!
- Old Glass Pane and Iron Bars -Changes the texture and model to the old ones! (Credits to [PoeticRainbow](https://modrinth.com/user/PoeticRainbow) for it)

- And so much, much more!

# Requirements (Important!) 
USE PROGRAMMER ART TO WORK!!!

Resource Pack requires [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)!
